title: solanum nigrum var. luteum
intro: Solanum nigrum var. luteum, also known as the yellow nightshade, is a plant species that belongs to the Solanum genus and is a variety of the more common black nightshade (Solanum nigrum). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Solanum nigrum var. luteum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be consumed fresh or dried for its medicinal properties.
